---
title: "I'd love to hear from you!"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Please feel free to reach out with any questions, project ideas, or just to say hello! I’m always open to discussing new opportunities and love connecting with like-minded people.

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mackenzie-thomson-455828253/){.btn .btn-primary} [GitHub](https://github.com/kenzthom){.btn .btn-primary} [Email](mailto:kenzthom@student.ubc.ca){.btn .btn-primary}

::::: {.columns style="gap:10px;"}
::: {.column width="35%"}
![](images/mebike.jpg)
:::

::: {.column width="35%"}
![](images/sheds.jpg)
:::
:::::
